changes: Fixed audio issues on Android. There should be no stuttering on most phones now. If you had turned off HRTF audio before, please reenable it back and try again.
Fixed some gestures not working properly in driving, such as the clutch.
Fixed radio buttons and slider gestures not working in the multiplayer lobby.
Rewrote the audio engine to use a more modern high-level library instead of the raw MiniAudioEx directly.
Added a help menu to directly open the game documentation and latest changes.
serverChanges: Fixed street adventure tracks not working correctly.
